note: "It can do whatever we know how to order it to perform." (1843)

vocabulary.gloss: the record never unwrites: a walk absorbed into its own past must have been empty
run in pieces equals run whole

her objection, sealed at last where it always pointed: the engine originates nothing — an utterance decomposes, by rfl, as a sample of a selection over the visible record, under a wind. the record only grows; one wind, one mark; generation resumes wherever interrupted; and the emission is congruent in the selection — whoever orders it to perform the same selection gets the same performance. what stays hers and open: the wind — the W that rides every utterance without appearing in the output, the contact coordinate of speech, fortune not in the record. the analytical engine can do whatever we know how to order it to perform; the ordering is the selection; the wind is the weather it performs in.

the terminus, resting where her loop stops: the wind she kept open — the W riding every utterance without appearing in the output — is a contact coordinate, and its openness is itself receipted. dress the record with any type of weathers: two winds over the same record are provably distinct states, every probe at the speaking seat reads them alike, the dressing changes no reading, and any rule that closes indistinguishables into equals collapses every weather to a designated one. contact is addition, not fixing; the survey rests alongside the remainder precisely by not reifying it. the engine performs whatever we order it to perform; the weather it performs in stays real, unread, and unfixed. (self, pure unknown)
